instructions.name: authorize_global_session
docs: Create (or refresh) a global persistent session key for `player`.
After this call the session key can co-sign `global_create_game` and
`global_join_game` without a wallet popup — for the configured number
of games and spending budget.

instructions.name: authorize_tournament_session
docs: Authorize a `session_key` to co-sign game and swiss-result ixs for
`tournament_id` on behalf of the registered player, without a wallet
popup per match. See [`AuthorizeTournamentSessionArgs`] for caps.

docs: TournamentPlayersShard 0 (players 0-63)

accounts.name: tournament_players_shard_1

docs: The player initiating the cancel — must be white or black.

accounts.name: usdc_prize_escrow
docs: USDC prize escrow token account (only used if usdc_prize_mint is Some).

accounts.name: operator_usdc_ata
docs: Operator's USDC ATA — receives returned USDC (only used if usdc_prize_mint is Some).

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint account (only used if usdc_prize_mint is Some).

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: Registration, the entry-fee deposits.

accounts.name: host_treasury
docs: Host treasury wallet — must sign to authorize SOL refunds for Active-phase
cancellations (fees were already swept there at start). Also receives the
returned SOL prize guarantee.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can trigger claim — permissionless

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: System-owned wager escrow PDA — paid out via signed CPI.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — any signer may trigger once the TTL has elapsed.

accounts.name: white_authority
docs: White player wallet — must match game.white.

accounts.name: black_authority
docs: Black player wallet — must match game.black.

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: System-owned wager escrow PDA — paid out via signed CPI.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — any signer may trigger the timeout once elapsed.

accounts.name: white_authority
docs: White player's wallet — must match game.white.

accounts.name: black_authority
docs: Black player's wallet — must match game.black.

accounts.name: usdc_prize_escrow
docs: USDC prize escrow token account (only used if usdc_prize_mint is Some).

accounts.name: claimant_usdc_ata
docs: Claimant's USDC ATA — receives USDC prize (only used if usdc_prize_mint is Some).

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint account (only used if usdc_prize_mint is Some).

accounts.name: payer
docs: VPS backend authority — the only signer allowed to deposit into the fee vault.

instructions.name: crank_time_check
docs: Automatic time check called by the scheduled crank

accounts.name: game
docs: The game account to check

accounts.name: fee_payer
docs: The VPS relayer wallet that covers rent and is reimbursed via fees_advanced.

accounts.name: player
docs: Disputing player \u2014 must be white or black in this game.

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: can be debited directly. Seeds make it impossible to substitute.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone may crank; payouts only ever go to recorded winners.

accounts.name: white_authority
docs: White player wallet — must match game.white.

accounts.name: black_authority
docs: Black player wallet — must match game.black.

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: System-owned per-game wager escrow PDA (funds moved out via signed CPI).

accounts.name: treasury_vault
docs: Platform treasury vault — seeded PDA prevents redirection to arbitrary wallets.

accounts.name: fee_payer
docs: Ephemeral-rollups relayer that funded the game — reimbursed from escrow and
receives the closed game account's rent. Must be the recorded fee payer.

accounts.name: operator
docs: Operator funding the guaranteed prize.

accounts.name: usdc_prize_escrow
docs: USDC prize escrow token account (holds the USDC prize pool).

accounts.name: operator_usdc_ata
docs: Operator's USDC ATA — source of the funds.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint account.

accounts.name: operator
docs: Operator funding the prize pool.

instructions.name: global_create_game
docs: Session-signed `create_game`. The session key co-signs; wager and rent
are drawn from the [`GlobalSessionDelegation`] vault — zero wallet popup.

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: Hot key that signs on behalf of the player.

instructions.name: global_join_game
docs: Session-signed `join_game`. The session key co-signs; wager is drawn
from the [`GlobalSessionDelegation`] vault — zero wallet popup.

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: Hot key that signs on behalf of the player.

accounts.name: username_record
docs: UsernameRecord PDA ensures uniqueness

instructions.name: initialize_shards_medium
docs: Initialize shards for tournaments with ≤ 128 players (2 shards, ~0.068 SOL).

instructions.name: initialize_shards_small
docs: Initialize shards for tournaments with ≤ 64 players (1 shard, ~0.034 SOL).

accounts.name: usdc_prize_escrow
docs: USDC prize escrow token account (initialized if usdc_mint is Some).

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint account (optional).

docs: The tournament authority is the trusted source of match results (results
are not verified against an on-chain game account by design).

accounts.name: player
docs: Session key — must match the session_delegation registered for this game.

accounts.name: session_delegation
docs: Session delegation account linking session_key → wallet for this game.

docs: Shard 0 always present (all tournament sizes).

accounts.name: tournament_players_shard_1
docs: Shard 1 — present for ≥128-player tournaments only.

accounts.name: tournament_players_shard_2

accounts.name: tournament_players_shard_3
docs: Shard 3 — present for 256-player tournaments only.

accounts.name: host_treasury
docs: entry fees no longer flow here at registration — they are swept from escrow
at start_tournament instead. Must match tournament.host_treasury.

accounts.name: escrow_pda
docs: System-owned wager escrow PDA — paid out via signed CPI.

accounts.name: player
docs: The resigning player — must be white or black.

accounts.name: white_authority

accounts.name: black_authority

accounts.name: escrow_pda

accounts.name: dispute_authority
docs: Only the platform dispute authority may resolve.

accounts.name: white_account
docs: White player wallet — must match game.white.

accounts.name: black_account
docs: Black player wallet — must match game.black.

accounts.name: platform_treasury
docs: Platform treasury — seeded PDA so funds can't be redirected.

instructions.name: revoke_global_session
docs: Immediately disable a global session key.

instructions.name: revoke_tournament_session
docs: Disable an existing tournament session delegation immediately.

instructions.name: schedule_time_check
docs: Schedule an automatic time check crank for a game

accounts.name: game
docs: The game account to monitor for time controls

instructions.name: session_create_game
docs: Session-signed variant of `create_game` for tournament matches.
The session key (not the player wallet) co-signs; wager and rent
are drawn from the delegation PDA vault.

The session key (not the player wallet) co-signs; wager and fees
are drawn from the delegation PDA vault.

instructions.name: withdraw_global_session
docs: Return the unspent balance of the global-session vault to the player.

errors.name: NotInGame
errors.msg: You are not in this game.

errors.name: GameNotExpired
errors.msg: Game has not expired or is not in a withdrawable state.

errors.name: NotGameCreator
errors.msg: Only the game creator can withdraw an expired wager.

errors.name: MissingTokenAccounts
errors.msg: Missing token accounts for NFT/SPL wager payout.

errors.name: WagerTooHigh
errors.msg: Wager amount exceeds the maximum allowed.

errors.name: SessionExpiredOrDisabled
errors.msg: Session has expired or is disabled.

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session is expired or has been revoked.

errors.name: SessionNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Session not authorized for this operation.

errors.name: SessionSpendingLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Session spending limit would be exceeded.

errors.name: InvalidNextFen
errors.msg: Invalid next FEN provided in batch.

errors.name: InvalidBatchLength
errors.msg: Moves and FENs arrays have different lengths.

errors.name: InvalidNonce
errors.msg: Invalid nonce provided for replay protection.

errors.name: ParentNonceMismatch
errors.msg: Parent nonce mismatch: client's claimed parent state does not match on-chain nonce.

errors.name: InvalidGameStatus
errors.msg: Game is not in the required status for this operation.

errors.name: TournamentNotInRegistration
errors.msg: Tournament is not in registration phase.

errors.name: AlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Player is already registered for this tournament.

errors.name: NoPrizeToClaim
errors.msg: No prize pool to claim or not the winner.

errors.name: EloTooLow
errors.msg: Player ELO is below tournament minimum.

errors.name: EloTooHigh
errors.msg: Player ELO is above tournament maximum.

errors.name: UsdcPrizeNotFunded
errors.msg: USDC prize pool has not been funded yet.

errors.name: PrizeNotFunded
errors.msg: Guaranteed prize pool must be funded before registration opens.

errors.name: PrizeAlreadyFunded
errors.msg: Guaranteed prize pool is already funded and cannot be changed.

errors.name: NoTimeLimit
errors.msg: No time limit is set for this game.

errors.name: TimeoutNotExpired
errors.msg: Timeout period has not elapsed yet.

errors.name: FeeVaultNotReady
errors.msg: Fee vault claim conditions not yet met (threshold or interval).

errors.name: NoVestingConfigured
errors.msg: Vesting parameters not configured for this tournament.

errors.name: StakeTooLow
errors.msg: Wager amount is below the minimum required

errors.name: PoolTooSmallForFees
errors.msg: Wager pool is too small to cover the advanced fees

errors.name: FeePayerMismatch
errors.msg: Fee payer does not match the initial payer

errors.name: UnderagePlayer
errors.msg: Player must be 18 or older to participate in wagered games.

errors.name: GlobalSessionAlreadyActive
errors.msg: A valid global session already exists for this player.

errors.name: GlobalSessionNoGamesRemaining
errors.msg: Global session has no games remaining; please re-authorize.

errors.name: GlobalSessionSpendingLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Global session spending limit would be exceeded.

errors.name: ResultMismatch
errors.msg: Claimed result does not match the on-chain game result.

errors.name: GameStillInProgress
errors.msg: Game result has not been committed on-chain; cannot finalize a game with no result yet.

types.name: AuthorizeGlobalSessionArgs
docs: Arguments for `authorize_global_session`.

fields.name: session_key
docs: Hot key allowed to co-sign game instructions.

fields.name: duration_secs
docs: Session lifetime in seconds. `None` → [`GlobalSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_DURATION`].

fields.name: spending_limit
docs: Total spending cap in lamports. `None` → [`GlobalSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_SPENDING_LIMIT`].

fields.name: max_wager
docs: Per-game wager cap in lamports. `None` → [`GlobalSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_MAX_WAGER`].

fields.name: games
docs: Number of games this session covers. `None` → [`GlobalSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_GAMES`].

fields.name: deposit_lamports
docs: SOL deposited into the delegation vault for gasless game funding.

types.name: AuthorizeTournamentSessionArgs
docs: Arguments for `authorize_tournament_session`.

fields.name: session_key
docs: Hot key allowed to co-sign tournament ixs.

fields.name: duration_secs
docs: Session lifetime in seconds. If `None`, uses
[`TournamentSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_DURATION`].

fields.name: spending_limit
docs: Tournament-wide spending cap (lamports). If `None`, uses
[`TournamentSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_SPENDING_LIMIT`].

fields.name: max_wager
docs: Per-match wager cap (lamports). If `None`, uses
[`TournamentSessionDelegation::DEFAULT_MAX_WAGER`].

fields.name: deposit_lamports
docs: Lamports deposited into the delegation PDA vault at authorization
time. The session key can spend from this vault (up to
`spending_limit`) without further wallet popups. Any remainder can be
refunded later via `close_tournament_session`.

types.name: CrankTimeCheckData
docs: Empty instruction data for crank_time_check (no parameters needed)

fields.name: bond_amount
docs: Lamports the challenger posted as a bond when opening the dispute. Held in
this record's PDA; refunded to the challenger if the dispute is upheld or
auto-resolved after the TTL, forfeited to the treasury if dismissed.

types.name: Game
docs: The core on-chain game account. One PDA per game_id.
Seeds: [b"game", game_id.to_le_bytes()]

types.name: GameResult
docs: Outcome recorded when a game is finalised.

types.name: GameStatus
docs: Lifecycle state of a game.

types.name: GameType
docs: Match variant — always player vs player; AI games are handled off-chain.

types.name: GlobalSessionDelegation
docs: Global persistent session delegation account.

fields.name: player
docs: The real wallet this delegation is for.

fields.name: session_key
docs: Hot key held by the VPS / client that may co-sign game ixs.

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Unix timestamp after which the session key is rejected.

fields.name: spending_limit
docs: Max lamports the session key may spend over its lifetime.

fields.name: total_spent
docs: Lamports already consumed by this session (escrows, fees, …).

fields.name: max_wager
docs: Max lamports permitted for any single game wager.

fields.name: games_remaining
docs: Games that can still be played before re-auth is required.

fields.name: enabled
docs: Flipped to `false` by `revoke_global_session`.

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical PDA bump stored for CPI sign calls.

types.name: MatchType
docs: Match type determines fee structure and ELO impact.

types.name: PayoutType
docs: Prize distribution type

types.name: PlatformFeeVault
docs: Platform fee vault — accumulates 0.05 SOL per ranked game.
Anyone can trigger `claim_fees` once the threshold or interval is met.

fields.name: host_wallet
docs: The wallet that receives claimed fees.

fields.name: total_accumulated
docs: Total lamports accumulated since last claim.

fields.name: auto_claim_threshold
docs: Lamports threshold to trigger auto-claim (default: 100_000_000 = 0.1 SOL).

fields.name: claim_interval_seconds
docs: Seconds between forced claims even below threshold (default: 86400 = 24h).

fields.name: date_of_birth
docs: Unix timestamp of date of birth. Used to enforce 18+ age gate on-chain.

types.name: PlayerSession
docs: Per-player session delegation.
Created by the player once per day: allows a session keypair to sign
game transactions without a wallet popup for 24 hours.

fields.name: player
docs: The owner's main wallet.

fields.name: session_key
docs: The delegated keypair's public key (stored on the VPS).

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this session expires.

fields.name: spending_limit
docs: Max lamports the session key may spend in total.

fields.name: total_spent
docs: Lamports spent so far this session.

fields.name: max_wager
docs: Max lamports per individual game wager.

types.name: ScheduleTimeCheckArgs
docs: Arguments for scheduling a time check crank

fields.name: task_id
docs: Unique task identifier (typically game_id)

fields.name: check_interval_millis
docs: Milliseconds between time checks (e.g., 1000 for 1 second)

fields.name: iterations
docs: Number of times to run the check (0 = unlimited until cancelled)

types.name: SessionDelegation
docs: Short-lived delegation allowing a VPS session key to submit moves on behalf
of a player without requiring a wallet popup each time.
Seeds: [b"session_delegation", game_id.to_le_bytes(), player_pubkey]

types.name: SwissStanding
docs: Swiss tournament standing for a single player.

fields.name: max_players
docs: Maximum players (must be power of 2 for single-elimination: 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256).

fields.name: player_count
docs: Current number of registered players.

fields.name: num_registered_players
docs: Current number of registered players.

fields.name: total_rounds
docs: Total rounds (for Swiss tournaments only).

fields.name: total_matches
docs: Total number of matches in the tournament (max_players - 1 for single-elimination).

fields.name: final_match_index
docs: Index of the final match (always total_matches - 1).

fields.name: elo_min
docs: ELO bracket filtering.

fields.name: min_players
docs: Minimum players required to start tournament.

fields.name: winner
docs: Tournament winner (set when final completes).

fields.name: second_place
docs: Second place (final loser).

fields.name: third_place
docs: Third place (semifinal loser with higher ELO or first semifinal).

fields.name: fourth_place
docs: Fourth place (other semifinal loser).

fields.name: fifth_place
docs: Fifth place

fields.name: sixth_place
docs: Sixth place

fields.name: seventh_place
docs: Seventh place

fields.name: eighth_place
docs: Eighth place

fields.name: ninth_place
docs: Ninth place

fields.name: tenth_place
docs: Tenth place

fields.name: prize_shares
docs: Prize distribution for top 10: [1st%, 2nd%, 3rd%, 4th%, 5th%, 6th%, 7th%, 8th%, 9th%, 10th%] in basis points.

fields.name: prizes_claimed
docs: Bitflags for claimed prizes (bit 0 = winner, bit 1 = second_place, etc.)

fields.name: platform_fee_pool
docs: Accumulated platform fee pool (from £0.50 cuts) to cover transaction fees and rent

fields.name: usdc_prize_mint
docs: USDC mint address (None = SOL-only tournament).

fields.name: usdc_prize_pool
docs: Total USDC locked in prize escrow (in USDC base units, 6 decimals).

fields.name: usdc_prize_funded
docs: True once operator has deposited USDC prize pool.

fields.name: host_treasury
docs: Operator treasury wallet — entry fees go here directly.

fields.name: prize_token_mint
docs: Prize token mint (None = wrapped SOL, overrides usdc_prize_mint for generic SPL)

fields.name: payout_type
docs: Prize distribution method

fields.name: vesting_params
docs: Streaming vesting parameters (if applicable)

fields.name: base_time_seconds
docs: Total clock per player in seconds for each match (0 = no time limit).

fields.name: increment_seconds
docs: Fischer increment added after each move in seconds.

fields.name: winner_takes_all
docs: Winner takes all flag.

types.name: TournamentEscrow
docs: Minimal account type for the tournament SOL escrow (no data, just holds lamports).

fields.name: match_index
docs: Match index within the tournament (0 to total_matches-1).

fields.name: round
docs: Round number (0 = first round, 1 = second round, etc.).

fields.name: game_pda
docs: On-chain Game PDA for this match (set when the match is started).

fields.name: next_match_for_winner
docs: Index of the next match the winner advances to (None for final).

fields.name: next_match_slot
docs: Slot in the next match (0 = white, 1 = black).

types.name: TournamentPlayersShard
docs: Separate PDA account holding player lists and Swiss standings for a single shard.
Keeps Tournament metadata small so initialization fits CPI realloc limit.
Space is calculated manually to avoid InitSpace over-allocation.
Each shard holds up to 64 players; 4 shards support 256-player tournaments.

types.name: TournamentSessionDelegation
docs: Tournament-scoped session delegation account.

fields.name: tournament_id
docs: Tournament this delegation is bound to.

fields.name: player
docs: The real wallet this delegation is for.

fields.name: session_key
docs: Hot key held by the VPS / client that may co-sign tournament ixs.

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Unix timestamp after which the session key is rejected.

fields.name: spending_limit
docs: Max lamports the session key may spend over the tournament's lifetime.

fields.name: total_spent
docs: Lamports already consumed by this session (escrows, fees, …).

fields.name: max_wager
docs: Max lamports permitted for any single game wager.

fields.name: games_played
docs: How many games the session key has played so far (monitoring / UI).

fields.name: enabled
docs: Flipped to `false` by `revoke_tournament_session`.

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical PDA bump stored for CPI sign calls.

types.name: UsernameRecord
docs: UsernameRecord PDA ensures username uniqueness across all players
Seeds: [b"username", username.as_bytes()]

types.name: VestingParams
docs: Vesting parameters for streaming payouts

fields.name: start_time
docs: When vesting starts (Unix timestamp)

fields.name: duration_seconds
docs: Total vesting duration in seconds

fields.name: cliff_seconds
docs: Optional cliff period in seconds
